data.title: Swiss Bank Faces Internal Conflict Over Crypto Strategy
data.description:
Swiss private bank Banque Syz is experiencing internal conflict due to differing views on its crypto strategy. According to PANews, Marc Syz has departed from the bank following disagreements with his father, Eric Syz, over plans to integrate crypto vault company Future Holdings into the bank's alternative assets division, Syz Capital. Marc Syz, along with business partner Richard Byworth, is now preparing for a dual listing of Future Holdings in Sweden and Switzerland and plans to establish an independent asset management company. Earlier this year, Future Holdings merged with Swedish-listed company H100 Group, resulting in an entity that holds approximately 3,500 bitcoins, making it one of Europe's largest corporate bitcoin holders.

Marc Syz advocates for increased investment in alternative assets, artificial intelligence, and digital assets, expressing concern that some institutions overly rely on Switzerland's reputation as a safe haven to sustain their operations. The bank confirmed the departure of Marc Syz and Byworth, stating that alternative investments remain a core pillar of the bank. Under Marc's leadership, Syz Capital's assets under management grew to approximately 2 billion Swiss francs, and following his departure, the team is now led by the group's Chief Financial Officer.

data.title: Global Heat-Related Deaths Expected to Increase with Rising Temperatures
data.description: As global temperatures continue to climb, the number of heat-related deaths is anticipated to rise significantly. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the impact of these rising temperatures will vary across countries, influenced by both economic status and climatic conditions. Wealthier nations may have more resources to mitigate the effects of extreme heat, while poorer countries could face greater challenges in protecting their populations. The disparity in resources and infrastructure will play a crucial role in determining how different regions cope with the increasing heat. This growing concern underscores the importance of addressing climate change and implementing measures to safeguard vulnerable communities worldwide.

data.title: Binance Futures to List META, NVDA, GOOGL Equity Perpetuals
data.description: Binance Futures will launch USDT-margined perpetual contracts tracking Meta Platforms (Nasdaq: META), NVIDIA (Nasdaq: NVDA), and Alphabet (Nasdaq: GOOGL) on March 26, expanding its equity derivatives lineup to three additional US large-caps. The contracts go live in sequence beginning 14:30 UTC, offer up to 10x leverage, settle in USDT, and trade 24/7. Funding fees are capped at ±2% and charged every eight hours.

data.title: Japan's Average Monthly Salary for Full-Time Employees Hits Record High in 2025
data.description: Japan's Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare announced on Tuesday that the average monthly salary for full-time employees in Japan reached 340,600 yen in 2025, marking the fourth consecutive year of record highs. According to Jin10, this figure excludes overtime pay and other additional compensation, representing a 3.1% increase from 2024. This is also the second consecutive year that the growth rate has remained around 3%.

data.title: Bhutan Transfers 519.7 Bitcoin to New Wallets
data.description: Onchain Lens posted on X that the Royal Government of Bhutan has transferred 519.7 Bitcoin, valued at $36.75 million, to two new wallets. This move signifies a strategic shift in the management of the country's cryptocurrency assets. The transfer highlights Bhutan's ongoing engagement with digital currencies, reflecting broader trends in governmental adoption of blockchain technology. The reasons behind the transfer remain undisclosed, but it underscores the increasing importance of cryptocurrency in national financial strategies.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | OCBC Strategist: Gold's Safe-Haven Appeal Resurfaces Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description: Gold's safe-haven demand is re-emerging as expectations for easing Middle East tensions and a weakening U.S. dollar come into play, according to Christopher Wang, a strategist at Singapore's OCBC Bank. This development underscores gold's enduring appeal as a safe-haven asset, despite previous pressures from a strong dollar. According to Jin10, the current market dynamics suggest that gold prices may continue to be influenced by the Federal Reserve's policy trajectory, the dollar's performance, and geopolitical shifts in the short term. However, the recent rebound indicates that price declines might still find support unless there is a significant rise in real yields.

data.title: YZi Labs Introduces Atlas Scout Program for University Students
data.description: YZi Labs has announced the launch of its Atlas Scout Program aimed at university students. YZi Labs posted on X, inviting students from prestigious institutions such as Stanford, Harvard, MIT, Columbia, NYU, Carnegie Mellon, and UC Berkeley to participate in the initiative. The program seeks to engage students in innovative projects and provide opportunities for growth and collaboration within the academic community. Interested individuals are encouraged to apply and become part of this educational endeavor.

data.title: Binance Expands Soft Staking to Include Ethereum (ETH)
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has expanded its Soft Staking feature to support Ethereum (ETH), allowing users to earn staking rewards on selected tokens directly from their Spot Accounts. Soft Staking provides flexibility, enabling users to trade, withdraw, or utilize their tokens while simultaneously earning rewards. The rewards are generated through an on-chain proof of stake mechanism and are distributed daily in the respective native token to users' Spot Accounts. The calculation of rewards is based on the daily average balance of eligible tokens held in users' Spot Accounts.

The addition of Ethereum (ETH) brings the total number of supported tokens for Soft Staking to 19, including BNB, SOL, ADA, TRX, TON, SUI, NEAR, APT, POL, ALGO, IOTA, AXS, EGLD, THETA, DASH, STRK, S, and BABY. To qualify for rewards, users must meet the minimum holding requirement for each token in their Spot balance, with a cap on the eligible holding amount. Balances exceeding this cap will not earn additional rewards. Users can activate Soft Staking via the Earn section on the Binance website or app, following a simple process to start earning rewards.

Binance emphasizes that users should refer to the Soft Staking Terms, Binance Terms of Use, and the Risk Warning before utilizing the Soft Staking feature. The platform notes that average daily snapshots of the Spot Account will commence at 00:00 (UTC) the day after activation, with staking rewards distributed between 00:00 and 08:00 (UTC) the following day. Binance reserves the right to amend or cancel the announcement at its discretion without prior notice. Users are advised to consider the volatility of digital asset prices and the potential risks involved in investment decisions.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Chinese Gold Jewelry Prices Rise, Jin10 Reports
data.description: Gold jewelry prices in China have seen a notable increase, according to Jin10. On March 25, several brands reported a rise of approximately 66 yuan per gram compared to the previous day. Chow Sang Sang's pure gold jewelry is priced at 1,418 yuan per gram, up from 1,350 yuan per gram yesterday. Similarly, Chow Tai Fook's pure gold jewelry is now priced at 1,412 yuan per gram, compared to 1,346 yuan per gram the previous day.

data.title: Japan's Self-Defense Forces Officer Arrested for Trespassing at Chinese Embassy
data.description: An officer from Japan's Self-Defense Forces was apprehended after unlawfully entering the premises of China's embassy in Tokyo. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this incident has led to formal complaints from Beijing, further straining the diplomatic relations between Japan and China. The arrest underscores ongoing tensions between the two nations, which have been marked by various disputes and diplomatic challenges.

data.title: Abraxas Capital Increases Short Position in Gold Futures
data.description:
On March 25, Abraxas Capital significantly increased its short position in gold futures, according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. Hyperinsight monitoring revealed that the sub-address (0xb83d…) rolled over its short positions, accumulating nearly $4 million in additional holdings.

Following this increase, the total size of its 5x leveraged short position in CL futures rose to $21.25 million, with the average holding price dropping from $5,187 to $4,796. The current price of GOKD stands at $4,587, resulting in an unrealized profit of approximately $980,000 and a return rate of 12%. The liquidation price is set at $6,144.

Previously, the short position was significantly increased when the gold price was around $4,850, coinciding with the peak of the last downward trend. Additionally, Abraxas Capital holds a $25 million short position in BRENTOIL (Brent crude oil), with an unrealized profit of $2.95 million.

data.title: Alibaba Cloud's JVS Claw Now Open to All Users
data.description: Alibaba Cloud has announced the full availability of its JVS Claw service, allowing all users to access it without an invitation code. According to PANews, users can download the corresponding client from the website to obtain a cloud-based 'lobster.' The new version of JVS Claw introduces several key feature upgrades, including mobile voice input, JVS file space, optimized skill invocation, a dedicated entry for scheduled tasks, and a one-click upgrade for Clawbot.

data.title: The Iranian military issued a strong statement to the United States, saying, "Don't call your defeat an agreement."
data.description: On March 25, local time, a spokesperson for Iran's Khatham Anbyah Central Command called on the United States, saying, "Don't call your failure an agreement." The spokesperson stated, "Your investments in the region will be lost, and you won't see the energy and oil prices of the past." However, according to US sources on March 24, Iran rejected US Presidential Envoy Witkov and Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner as US negotiators, accusing them of "betrayal." Trump told the media on March 23 that the US had held talks with Iran and reached an agreement on key points. However, Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf denied any negotiations with the US on March 23 in a social media post. (CCTV)

data.title: Iran: Previous energy and oil price levels will not be restored until the armed forces ensure regional stability.
data.description: A spokesperson for Iran's Supreme Joint Military Command stated that past energy and oil price levels will not return until the Iranian armed forces ensure regional stability. (Jinshi)

data.title: Japan's Tosoh Announces Polyethylene Resin Price Increase Due to Middle East Conflict
data.description: Japan's Tosoh Corporation has announced an increase in the price of polyethylene resin, citing the ongoing conflict in the Middle East as the primary reason for the adjustment. According to Jin10, the company highlighted the impact of geopolitical tensions on the supply chain and production costs, which have necessitated the price hike. Tosoh's decision reflects broader concerns within the industry about the stability of raw material supplies amid regional instability. The company aims to mitigate the effects of these disruptions by adjusting its pricing strategy, ensuring continued operations and supply to its customers.

data.title: U.S. Reportedly Offers Iran 15-Point Peace Plan to End War
data.description:
The United States has delivered a 15-point plan to Iran aimed at ending the Middle East war, transmitted through Pakistan, whose army chief Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir has emerged as the primary interlocutor between Washington and Tehran, the New York Times reported, citing two officials briefed on the diplomacy. 
The plan addresses Iran's ballistic missile and nuclear programs as well as maritime routes, including the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has effectively closed to most Western shipping since the conflict began Feb. 28, disrupting global oil and gas supply and driving prices higher. It remains unclear whether Iran will accept the plan as a basis for negotiations, whether Israel — which has been conducting joint strikes with the U.S. — endorsed the proposal, or who holds decision-making authority in Tehran following the killing of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on the war's first day. The White House confirmed diplomacy was underway but said "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated." Iran still holds 440 kilograms of highly enriched uranium. Israeli officials say the war is likely to continue for weeks.

data.title: 美国据报向伊朗递交15点停战方案
data.description:
据《纽约时报》援引两名知情官员报道，美国已经由巴基斯坦渠道向伊朗递交一份15点停战方案，寻求结束中东战争。巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔上将已成为美伊之间的核心中间人，埃及与土耳其亦在推动伊朗积极接触。据悉，该方案涉及伊朗弹道导弹及核计划，并包含霍尔木兹海峡航运问题。
自2月28日战争爆发以来，伊朗已实际封锁该海峡，导致全球油气供应受阻、价格大幅上涨。目前尚不清楚伊朗是否接受该方案作为谈判基础，以色列是否认可该提案亦无定论。战争首日伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊已在以色列空袭中身亡，德黑兰内部谁有权拍板对外谈判仍不明朗。白宫发言人确认外交努力正在推进，但强调"'史诗怒火行动'仍在持续推进"。以色列官员表示战事预计仍将持续数周。伊朗目前仍持有440公斤高浓缩铀。

data.title: Iran's Military Command: Energy and Oil Prices Unlikely to Return to Previous Levels Until Regional Stability Ensured
data.description: Iran's top military spokesperson has stated that energy and oil prices are unlikely to revert to their previous levels until stability is achieved in the region. According to Jin10, the spokesperson emphasized the role of Iran's armed forces in ensuring regional stability, which is seen as a prerequisite for the normalization of energy markets. This statement highlights the ongoing geopolitical tensions affecting global oil prices and energy markets.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: The market is blinded by overwhelming optimism and will not buy risky assets in the current environment.
data.description: Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform that the market is currently filled with excessive optimism. He expressed hope that the conflict would end, but said he would not buy risky assets in the current environment.

data.title: GameStop incurred a net loss of $131.6 million after staking 4,709 BTC.
data.description: Analyst Emmett Gallic wrote on the X platform that GameStop purchased 4,710 BTC for $500 million in May 2025. In January of this year, GameStop pledged 4,709 BTC to Coinbase Credit as collateral for covered call options, deconfirmed the BTC and recorded it as $368.3 million in receivables, resulting in a net loss of $131.6 million. Since the pledging, the price of Bitcoin has fallen by approximately 25%.
